title: Multipart upload sdk node (Ingestion)
summary: Multipart upload sdk node — ingestion workflow walkthrough.

content.text:
## Goal

Demonstrate "multipart upload (sdk node)" against the Tinybox ingestion surface end to end.

## Walkthrough

# Step 1 — prepare a bucket for the ingestion workflow.
tinybox buckets create my-bucket --region us-east-1
Apply the recipe; verify with the API reference under [API reference](/docs/api/buckets/get).
